title: selaginella intertexta
intro: Selaginella intertexta, also known as the "spike moss" or "spike-leaved spike moss," is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella intertexta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
